outputs.knowledge_preflight_packet: Metadata-only packet with one registry knowledge starting ref, one non-authoritative NotebookLM binding, one unresolved source packet gap, and target-facing claim-seed guidance. The packet points at existing surfaces by ref only and does not replace the target workflow.
outputs.query_first_plan: Use fixed query-first order: registry knowledge and canon-backed Obsidian export first, NotebookLM bindings second, source packet and evidence surfaces third for the remaining gap, Drive/package refs last only if still needed.
outputs.source_scope_recommendation: Start from the registry knowledge ref as the strongest available synthetic entry point. Treat the NotebookLM binding as orientation only. Deepen into the missing source packet before making any source-backed claim beyond the registry-starting ref.
outputs.claim_ceiling_seed: Allowed claim ceiling: one registry-backed starting ref exists; one NotebookLM binding may guide search but has no authority; one source packet gap remains; target workflow may receive refs and uncertainty notes only.
outputs.target_workflow_handoff: Handoff should contain the registry starting ref, NotebookLM binding label as non-authoritative context, explicit source packet gap, fixed-order continuation route, and claim ceiling seed. It should not include raw evidence or upgraded authority.
outputs.boundary_review_note: Public-safe synthetic calibration only. No tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden refs, private evidence, upstream mutation, or authority promotion is claimed.

provenance: Synthetic workflow contract for Workflow Knowledge Preflight v0
Synthetic scenario facts and boundary policy supplied in prompt
gaps: One source packet gap remains unresolved
NotebookLM binding exists but provides orientation only and no authority
downstream_handoff: Pass metadata refs and claim-seed guidance to the target workflow
Preserve uncertainty notes so the target workflow can deepen sources without treating preflight as final evidence
boundary_review_note: No upstream artifacts are mutated or promoted beyond the synthetic contract
no_claims: No claim of tool use, file edits, runtime paths, hidden refs, or private/raw evidence
No claim that preflight is an end-to-end replacement for the target workflow
